content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.92%, all major sectors green, VIX down ~4% to 17.34. FMCG, Auto, Realty, IT leading; portfolio sitting on +1.15% unrealized. Strong earnings season (Nestle, Bandhan, GRSE, HindZinc, CoalIndia all beats). Bias is constructive but my book is already 50% deployed and many names are extended after big single-day moves — discipline is to manage existing winners, not chase breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +7.9% with strong Q4 catalyst still playing out. Current SL 1048 is just below CMP and is fine as a tight trail. Keeping SL at 1040 (just below today's intraday low region of ~1034 and VWAP support) gives a touch more breathing room while still locking in ~5.7% gain. Target 1110 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge -2.7%. SL 119 still appropriate (~2.2% below CMP). Gold thesis intact with Fed/Iran overhang. No change warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1455.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.7% on strong Q4 beat (+27% PAT, +22% revenue). Trail SL up from 1448 to 1455 (just below today's VWAP 1455.30) to lock in ~3% gain. Target 1500 intact — strong FMCG momentum with rural premiumization tailwind."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position essentially flat. SL 401 already very tight (~0.4% below CMP). Q4 results May 15 catalyst ahead. Let the SL handle the downside; no need to tighten further given proximity. If hit, exit cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.6%. SL 1750 already at near-breakeven (~0.6% below CMP) — effectively locked in. High-volume day reflects Organon acquisition reaction. Let it run toward 1810 target with current tight SL protection."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.5%. SL 320.50 at breakeven — risk is already neutralized. Board meeting tomorrow (Apr 30) and Q4 May 19 are upcoming catalysts. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.6% on strong Q4 (PAT +75% YoY) plus Rs 5.25 dividend. Current SL 480 is above breakeven. Modify to 478 to give a hair more room below today's pullback low of ~481, still locking in ~1.9% gain. Target 495 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%. Current SL 615 is ABOVE CMP 615.65 — effectively a near-trigger but locks in tiny gain. Tomorrow is Rs 11 dividend record date so I want to hold through tomorrow for the dividend capture. SL is already tight; keeping as-is. If stopped, no harm."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already have an OPEN BUY @ 200 working from earlier. Stock is now at 201.80 after gapping up +11% on Q4 beat. Per ORDER HYGIENE, I will NOT stack a second order. The open order at 200 is just below CMP and may fill on a routine pullback — leaving it as-is. Will not chase at extended levels."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL slightly to lock in ~5.7% gain with room to breathe."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge — current SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1455.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to just below VWAP to lock in ~3% gain on strong Q4 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already very tight at 401; no change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks gain near breakeven; let target work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry/breakeven — risk already neutralized."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "reasoning": "Slightly loosen overly-tight SL to avoid noise stop-out while still locking gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hold through tomorrow's dividend record date; SL already above entry."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GRSE (+6% today, +49% in April) and BANDHANBNK (+11%) are both heavily extended single-day moves — not chasing. ONGC, RELIANCE, COALINDIA all near 52w highs in the energy cluster — already have COALINDIA + NTPC + POWERGRID exposure to energy/utilities, so adding ONGC/RELIANCE would create cluster concentration. VEDL demerger record date tomorrow — purely binary event, pass. TECHM looks technically strong but I have no IT exposure and book is already 50% deployed; not adding here. Will watch BANDHANBNK pullback toward 195-200 (existing pending limit may fill).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed across 8 positions with +1.15% unrealized. Cluster check: PNBHOUSING (financials), NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA (energy/utilities = ~24% of capital — at the cluster cap, no more adds here), NESTLEIND (FMCG), SUNPHARMA (pharma), HINDZINC (metals), GOLDBEES (hedge). Diversified enough. Rolling 5-day P&L is -4.4k with 14% win rate — this is a flag to be MORE selective, not more active. Today's task is to manage winners (trail SLs on PNBHOUSING/NESTLEIND/COALINDIA done) and let the open BANDHANBNK/TATAPOWER/PHARMABEES/GLENMARK limits work. NO new entries this tick — hysteresis rule applies (book >50% deployed, multiple winners working, plenty of catalysts already in book). Capital preservation > activity."
}
